_patch_meta.description: Session B complete for registry 103 (love). All stages done. Confirming session_b_status = Analysis Complete. Note: status was already set to Analysis Complete by the PREANALYSIS patch applicator. This patch confirms and records session closure.

set.sb_classification_reasoning: Love at its fullest is received from outside the human person — poured into hearts by the Spirit (Rom 5:5), preceded by God's prior love (1Jo 4:19). This is spirit-primary in origin. As experienced and exercised, love operates characteristically at the soul level — the settled disposition of the inner life, the affective-volitional orientation of the heart. Love's bodily expression (kiss, embrace, tears, running) is regular and genuine but secondary — it manifests love rather than constituting it. Classification: Spirit-Soul Interface. Confidence: High.

operations.description: Session B Analysis Complete — registry 103 love. Spirit-Soul Interface classification recorded.

_patch_summary.note: sb_classification and sb_classification_reasoning written alongside status confirmation. These fields were null at Stage 2 Pass 4 close and are now formally recorded.
